description.value: > High Mountain Goat These goats are known for being sure-footed climbers, scaling vertical peaks that would give a monkey pause. Requirements: Ram mount. Climber: High mountain goats gain a +2 trait bonus on Climb checks, and Climb is a class skill for them.
